message:
fix(parser,layout): harden subgraph parsing and prevent isolated nodes from exploding layout width

Parser fixes:
- Strip inline comments before processing flowchart statements so
  trailing %% comments no longer corrupt node IDs or edge targets
- Rewrite parse_subgraph_statement to require whitespace after keyword
  (prevents false matches on identifiers starting with "subgraph"),
  prefer explicit delimiter labels ([]/()/{}) over bare id-title split,
  and handle quoted titles correctly
- Normalize statements through strip_inline_comment() before all parse
  paths (chumsky, directive, edge, node)
- Extract resolve_theme_preset() helper; move SvgRenderConfig creation
  into per-format branches to avoid stale config leaking across formats

Layout fixes:
- Prevent isolated nodes (no incident edges) from each getting their own
  rank band in TB/LR layouts — keep them in a shared rank-0 band
- Sort weakly-connected components by minimum node priority before
  compacting, producing deterministic left-to-right component ordering
- Add tb_isolated_nodes_remain_in_a_single_rank_band regression test

Test improvements:
- Tighten subgraph integration test from ≥ bounds to exact equality
  assertions on node/edge/cluster counts
- Verify cluster membership by title→node-set mapping
- Assert zero parse warnings on valid subgraph input

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
